text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/a63d6c943d3e2e14007b20edc4446d8396f3ef0b#diff-e25ed07a832aeb4259139174563fb305772a248a3478c060e606421b01cb55c8R478-R480>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=development&sektion=7&manpath=FreeBSD#HISTORY>

cvs(1) and svn(1) refer to non-existent <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=cvs&sektion=1&apropos=0&manpath=FreeBSD+13.1-RELEASE> and <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=svn&sektion=1&apropos=0&manpath=FreeBSD+13.1-RELEASE>. 

Instead, in pages for ports: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=cvs&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=svn&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports>
